description: Remove unreachable response.ok check in the DELETE branch of the api() function in lucid-api.ts.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/lucid && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Remove dead response.ok check in DELETE branch of lucid-api.ts
userStories.description: In plugins/lucid/src/lucid-api.ts, the DELETE branch (around lines 63-71) calls fetchFromPage and then checks `if (response.status === 204)` (correct) and `if (response.ok)` (dead code — fetchFromPage already threw on non-ok). The else branch `return {} as T` is also unreachable. Simplify the DELETE branch to remove the dead ok-check and unreachable fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: The `if (response.ok)` check in the DELETE branch is removed
The `return {} as T` fallback after the dead ok-check is removed
204 No Content responses still return {} as T correctly
Non-204 2xx responses still return the parsed JSON body
